# Contributing Guidelines

See [vsc-extension-quickstart.md](vsc-extension-quickstart.md) for more information on how to contribute to this project.

## Testing Themes

To test the themes, you can build the Rojo model project and open it in Roblox Studio. This will allow you to compare the themes between Roblox Studio and VS Code. You can use the following command to build the Rojo model project:

```
rojo build -o ThemeTests.rbxm
```
